name: morph-button-card
description: A CTA built on the ibirdui Button that morphs into a floating plan card: the surface springs between two sizes while the Button and the Card swap through AnimatePresence, so both get a real enter and exit. The card contents stagger in on open and reverse-stagger out on close. Built on framer-motion via block-motion, so the whole morph collapses to a plain crossfade under prefers-reduced-motion.

notes: Collapsed, the block is a single Button with a visible label, so it is keyboard- and screen-reader-reachable
Expanded, the card exposes a labelled close control and its title renders as plain text (not a heading) so it never forces a heading level onto the host page
Decorative icons are aria-hidden and do not contribute to the accessible name
The size/stagger morph respects prefers-reduced-motion via MotionProvider, collapsing to a plain crossfade

intents: a button that expands into a floating plan or upgrade card
a shared-element morph from a CTA to a detail card
an animated upgrade card built on ibirdui
